artifact: CW-MDR-008 M8-11 — declared IRR stage dependency graph
status: canonical source of truth for stage data-dependencies
verified_against: edge-functions/irr-stage-engine/index.ts (STAGES array; each stage's prior[N] reads)
semantics: depends_on lists the stages whose output_json a stage READS (prior[N]). This is the DATA-dependency graph. Control/gating constraints (e.g. validate_contract must pass, schema_validation gates final_assembly) are SEPARATE and are NOT derivable from prior[N] reads; the parallel executor (build step 5) must overlay them. See notes.
note_on_parallelism: data-dependency waves are the theoretical parallelism ceiling, not an execution order. The verified graph corrects the DR's inferred 'independent band 7-11': stages 8 and 9 READ prior[7], so they depend on stage 7. The genuinely concurrent sets are {7,10,11} (after 6) then {8,9} (after 7).

stages.name: validate_contract
stages.note: run signature takes no prior; reads job input only.

stages.name: evidence_risk_reasoning
stages.note: reads job input only, NOT the compiled specs (corrects the earlier 4<-2,3 inference).

stages.name: evidence_traceability
stages.note: reads prior[7].fields.claimStatus_list -> depends on stage 7 (NOT independent of it).
